content.full_text:
July 6, 2004

Kirk Alan Pessner
Law Office of Russell H. Miller
20 Park Road, Suite E
Burlingame, CA 94010-4443

Re: Request for Advice
Our File No.: W-04-121

Dear Mr. Pessner:

This is to advise you that we have withdrawn the above-captioned request for advice, pursuant to our conversation of June 29th and your decision on June 30th to withdraw the request.

Should you have any additional questions, please contact this office at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Staff Counsel
